p.seg: To all people who shall view or hear these letters Robert de Brus sends greeting.

Let them know me to have given, and granted, and made firm by this present charter, to Humphrey fitz Simon and his heirs in return for his homage and service 'Hunnelvecroft' \by the correct boundaries/ freely and quitly, honourably and peaceably. This and the aforesaid croft the aforesaid Humphrey and his heirs shall hold of me and my heirs, rendering to me and my heirs annually two golden spurs at the time of the Carlisle fair.
With these witnesses: Hugh of Corrie; Williem de Heriz; Richard del Bois; Robert of Crosby; Richard de Humez; Laurence of Berkeley; William Francis; Hugh fitz Hamelin; Ivo fitz Hamelin.
